title: eryngium eurycephalum
intro: Eryngium eurycephalum, also known as the round-leaved sea holly, is a flowering plant species in the family Apiaceae, commonly found in dry areas and rocky terrain. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its various medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can help to soothe wounds and reduce swelling. The health benefits of Eryngium eurycephalum include its ability to boost the immune system, reduce fever, and alleviate digestive issues. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are often used to treat a range of ailments, from respiratory issues to skin conditions.
